title: Cafe Coffee Day is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Cafe Coffee Day is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Cafe Coffee Day is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cafe Coffee Day:
Cafe Coffee Day is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day!
